positive: A highly stylized, minimalist depiction of a mountain range silhouette at sunset, viewed through a perfectly geometric, abstract portal. The mountains should be sharp, symmetrical, and rendered in deep indigo and slate gray. The portal should emit warm, vibrant gradient light (burnt orange, magenta, deep gold) that creates strong backlighting and defined edges on the silhouettes. The overall composition must be clean, high contrast, and centered, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Line art elements can connect the mountains and the portal for an ethereal, modern look. Aesthetic: Neo-geometric, fine art, detailed vector graphic, ultra-clean lines, symmetrical composition, golden ratio adherence.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, grainy, messy, low detail, cartoon, photorealistic, extra limbs, bad anatomy, amateur drawing, disfigured, blurry edges
